html:
Exclusive to:

A Palm Leaf Hut is a craftable Structure in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found under the Survival Tab and requires 4 Palm Leaf, 4 Bamboo and 3 Rope to craft, and an Alchemy Engine, or a Sea Lab to prototype. As long as the player is under, it provides complete protection from Rain and 180 point protection against Overheating. A Palm Leaf Hut does not have a durability and will not expire over time, however, it still can be destroyed by Fire or by other means that destroy player structures. Despite its flimsy appearance, it is also not affected by Strong Winds.

It should be noted that the protective area of the Palm Leaf Hut is quite a bit larger than the apparent size of its roof, and the players will be protected even if they appear to be just partially under it.

If placed close enough to a safe source of heat (Chiminea or Firepit) one can dry off even during heavy storms

Gallery

  • Wigfrid standing under a Palm Leaf Hut with Rawling.
  • A burnt Palm Leaf Hut does not provide protection from rain.
  • A Palm Leaf Hut protecting Wilson from rain. Notice the absence of the Wetness meter.
  • A burnt Palm Leaf Hut.

As long as the player is under, it provides complete protection from Rain and 180 point protection against Overheating. summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Túp Lều Lá Dừa là một Kiến Trúc có thể chế tạo được trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Sinh Tồn và cần 4 Lá Cọ, 4 Tre và 3 Dây Thừng để chế tạo, và Máy Luyện Kim hoặc Phòng Thí Nghiệm Biển để nguyên mẫu. Miễn là người chơi ở dưới, nó sẽ cung cấp khả năng bảo vệ hoàn toàn khỏi Mưa và bảo vệ 180 điểm khỏi Quá nóng. Túp lều lá cọ không có độ bền và sẽ không hết hạn theo thời gian, tuy nhiên, nó vẫn có thể bị phá hủy bởi Lửa hoặc các phương tiện khác phá hủy công trình của người chơi. Mặc dù có vẻ ngoài mỏng manh nhưng nó cũng không bị ảnh hưởng bởi Gió Mạnh.

A '''Palm Leaf Hut''' is a craftable [[Structure]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Survival Tab]] and requires 4 [[Palm Leaf]], 4 [[Bamboo]] and 3 [[Rope]] to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]], or a [[Sea Lab]] to prototype. As long as the player is under, it provides complete protection from [[Rain]] and 180 point protection against [[Overheating]]. A Palm Leaf Hut does not have a durability and will not expire over time, however, it still can be destroyed by [[Fire]] or by other means that destroy player structures. Despite its flimsy appearance, it is also not affected by [[Strong Winds]].

It should be noted that the protective area of the Palm Leaf Hut is quite a bit larger than the apparent size of its roof, and the players will be protected even if they appear to be just partially under it.

If placed close enough to a safe source of heat (Chiminea or Firepit) one can dry off even during heavy storms
